creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please try a build direct from ports/mail/spamd without portmaster, ccache and without customized /etc/make.conf

On a fresh installed 11.1 (amd64) system I see no issues.

# uname -a
FreeBSD f11.abaxx.net 11.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE #0 r321309: Fri Jul 21 02:08:28 UTC 2017     root@releng2.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

# portsnap fetch && portsnap extract
...
# cd /usr/ports/mail/spamd/
# make
===>   spamd-4.9.1_3 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by spamd-4.9.1_3 for building
===>  Extracting for spamd-4.9.1_3
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for spamd-4.9.1.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for spamd-4.9.1_3
===>  Configuring for spamd-4.9.1_3
===>  Building for spamd-4.9.1_3
--- all ---
===> spamd (all)
--- objwarn ---
--- .depend ---
--- objwarn ---
Warning: Object directory not changed from original /usr/ports/mail/spamd/work/spamd-4.9.1/spamd
--- .depend ---
echo spamd: /usr/lib/libc.a /usr/lib/libcrypto.a /usr/lib/libmd.a >> .depend
--- spamd.o ---
--- sdl.o ---
--- grey.o ---
--- sync.o ---
--- spamd.o ---
cc -O2 -pipe  -I/usr/include -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wstrict-prototypes   -MD  -MF.depend.spamd.o -MTspamd.o -std=gnu99 -fstack-protector-strong    -Qunused-arguments  -c spamd.c -o spamd.o
--- sdl.o ---
cc -O2 -pipe  -I/usr/include -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wstrict-prototypes   -MD  -MF.depend.sdl.o -MTsdl.o -std=gnu99 -fstack-protector-strong    -Qunused-arguments  -c sdl.c -o sdl.o
--- sync.o ---
cc -O2 -pipe  -I/usr/include -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wstrict-prototypes   -MD  -MF.depend.sync.o -MTsync.o -std=gnu99 -fstack-protector-strong    -Qunused-arguments  -c sync.c -o sync.o
--- grey.o ---
cc -O2 -pipe  -I/usr/include -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wstrict-prototypes   -MD  -MF.depend.grey.o -MTgrey.o -std=gnu99 -fstack-protector-strong    -Qunused-arguments  -c grey.c -o grey.o
--- spamd.8.gz ---
gzip -cn spamd.8 > spamd.8.gz
--- spamd ---
cc -O2 -pipe -I/usr/include -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wstrict-prototypes -std=gnu99 -fstack-protector-strong -Qunused-arguments   -L/usr/lib -fstack-protector -o spamd spamd.o sdl.o grey.o sync.o  -lcrypto -lmd

--- .depend ---
--- objwarn ---
Warning: Object directory not changed from original /usr/ports/mail/spamd/work/spamd-4.9.1/spamd-setup
--- .depend ---
echo spamd-setup: /usr/lib/libc.a /usr/lib/libz.a >> .depend
--- spamd-setup.o ---
--- spamd-setup.8.gz ---

cc -O2 -pipe  -I/usr/include -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wstrict-prototypes   -MD  -MF.depend.spamd-setup.o -MTspamd-setup.o -std=gnu99 -fstack-protector-strong    -Qunused-arguments  -c spamd-setup.c -o spamd-setup.o
--- spamd-setup.8.gz ---
gzip -cn spamd-setup.8 > spamd-setup.8.gz
--- spamd-setup ---
cc -O2 -pipe -I/usr/include -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wstrict-prototypes -std=gnu99 -fstack-protector-strong -Qunused-arguments   -L/usr/lib -fstack-protector -o spamd-setup spamd-setup.o  -lz

--- sync.o ---
cc -O2 -pipe  -I/usr/include -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wstrict-prototypes -I/usr/ports/mail/spamd/work/spamd-4.9.1/spamdb/../spamd   -MD  -MF.depend.sync.o -MTsync.o -std=gnu99 -fstack-protector-strong    -Qunused-arguments  -c /usr/ports/mail/spamd/work/spamd-4.9.1/spamdb/../spamd/sync.c -o sync.o

--- sync.o ---
cc -O2 -pipe  -I/usr/include -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wstrict-prototypes -I/usr/ports/mail/spamd/work/spamd-4.9.1/spamlogd/../spamd   -MD  -MF.depend.sync.o -MTsync.o -std=gnu99 -fstack-protector-strong    -Qunused-arguments  -c /usr/ports/mail/spamd/work/spamd-4.9.1/spamlogd/../spamd/sync.c -o sync.o
